loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing active power and load factor (stress) — winding/oil temperatures and stress border are not measured or available for this asset.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing active power load history — thermal data (oil/winding/hotspot) is not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing total active energy consumption to estimate life fill — derated capacity and base design life are unavailable because this asset's nameplate rating (rated_kva/rated_kw) and design life are unknown.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for aging factor and loss of life — direct thermal aging metrics are not measured for this asset.
